page.title: Dubhe (licence-free): Best Boat in Marbella for Licence-free self-drive afternoon

data.meta_description: Dubhe (licence-free) best for self-drive in Marbella. No licence needed. 8m boat, 5 pax, €749/2h from Puerto Banús. Book your afternoon adventure now.
data.summary: Dubhe is the only licence-free self-drive boat in Marbella, perfect for small groups wanting freedom without a skipper. This 8m boat departs Puerto Banús, holds 5 passengers, and starts at €749 for 2 hours with drinks and snacks included.
key_facts: No licence required for self-drive operation
From €749 for 2 hours (skipper not included, but you drive)
All charters include fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA
Ideal for a short afternoon escape along the Marbella coast
Top speed approx 25-30 knots (4-stroke outboard engine)
Book via WhatsApp for availability and longer durations

faq.q: Do I need a boat licence to drive the Dubhe?
faq.a: No, the Dubhe is licence-free. You can drive it yourself without any prior qualifications. We provide a brief safety briefing before departure so you feel confident at the helm.

faq.q: How many people can the Dubhe take?
faq.a: The Dubhe has a maximum capacity of 5 passengers including the driver. It is an 8-metre boat, perfect for a small group of friends or family.

faq.q: What is included in the price for the Dubhe?
faq.a: Every charter includes fuel, a licensed skipper (though you drive yourself), water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). The price is all-inclusive from €749 for 2 hours.

faq.q: Where does the Dubhe depart from?
faq.a: The Dubhe departs from Puerto Banús, the iconic marina in Marbella. You'll meet us at the dock and we'll get you on the water quickly.

faq.q: Can I extend the charter beyond 2 hours?
faq.a: Yes, longer durations are available. You can book for half-day or full-day trips. Contact us via WhatsApp for pricing and availability for longer hire.

faq.q: What areas can I visit with the Dubhe?
faq.a: You can explore the Marbella coastline, including the Golden Mile, Cabopino, and even head towards Estepona. The boat is nimble and ideal for coastal cruising. Always stay within safe navigation limits.

faq.q: Is there a minimum age to drive the Dubhe?
faq.a: You must be at least 18 years old to drive the boat. All drivers will need to sign a waiver and provide a valid ID. No licence is required.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad?
faq.a: Your safety is our priority. If weather conditions are unsafe, we will reschedule your booking or offer a full refund. We monitor forecasts closely before every departure.

data.body_html:
If you want the freedom of driving your own boat on the Marbella coast without needing a licence, the Dubhe is your only choice. At 8 metres long and seating up to 5 people, this licence-free self-drive boat departs from Puerto Banús and starts at €749 for 2 hours — all inclusive. No skipper, no paperwork, just you, the sea, and the Costa del Sol sun.

Why the Dubhe is the best licence-free self-drive boat in Marbella

The Dubhe is the only boat in our fleet that does not require a boating licence. While other boats like the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 come with a skipper, the Dubhe puts you in control. It's ideal for a spontaneous afternoon on the water — no planning, no exams, no stress.

Dubhe boat specifications at a glance

  • Length: 8 metres
  • Capacity: 5 passengers (including driver)
  • Engine: 4-stroke outboard, approx 25-30 knots top speed
  • Departure point: Puerto Banús
  • Licence needed: None
  • Price: From €749 for 2 hours (all inclusive)

What is included in your Dubhe charter

Every Dubhe charter includes everything you need for a great afternoon: fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden fees. You just show up, get a quick safety briefing, and drive away.

Best routes for a self-drive afternoon from Puerto Banús

From Puerto Banús, head east along the Golden Mile towards Marbella Marina and Cabopino. The coastline is dotted with coves like Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés, perfect for a quick swim stop. Alternatively, go west towards Estepona and Sotogrande for a longer cruise. The Dubhe is nimble enough to explore shallow bays and anchor near the beach.

How to book the Dubhe

Booking is simple. Contact us via WhatsApp for availability, longer durations, or any questions. We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance, especially during peak summer months. You can also explore our full fleet on the Boat Rental Marbella homepage.

Who is the Dubhe for?

The Dubhe is perfect for couples, small families, or a group of friends who want a private, self-guided experience. It is not suitable for large parties (max 5 people) or those wanting a luxury yacht experience — for that, check the Mangusta 80. But for a quick, affordable, and licence-free adventure, the Dubhe is unmatched.

Compare the Dubhe with other licence-free options in Marbella

There are very few licence-free boats available for self-drive in Marbella. The Speedboat (7m, 6 pax) also departs from Puerto Banús but requires a licence. The Dubhe stands alone as the only true no-licence option in our fleet. If you want to drive yourself without any qualifications, this is it.

Frequently asked questions

Do I need a boat licence to drive the Dubhe?

No, the Dubhe is licence-free. You can drive it yourself without any prior qualifications. We provide a brief safety briefing before departure so you feel confident at the helm.

How many people can the Dubhe take?

The Dubhe has a maximum capacity of 5 passengers including the driver. It is an 8-metre boat, perfect for a small group of friends or family.

What is included in the price for the Dubhe?

Every charter includes fuel, a licensed skipper (though you drive yourself), water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). The price is all-inclusive from €749 for 2 hours.

Where does the Dubhe depart from?

The Dubhe departs from Puerto Banús, the iconic marina in Marbella. You'll meet us at the dock and we'll get you on the water quickly.

Can I extend the charter beyond 2 hours?

Yes, longer durations are available. You can book for half-day or full-day trips. Contact us via WhatsApp for pricing and availability for longer hire.

What areas can I visit with the Dubhe?

You can explore the Marbella coastline, including the Golden Mile, Cabopino, and even head towards Estepona. The boat is nimble and ideal for coastal cruising. Always stay within safe navigation limits.

Is there a minimum age to drive the Dubhe?

You must be at least 18 years old to drive the boat. All drivers will need to sign a waiver and provide a valid ID. No licence is required.

What happens if the weather is bad?

Your safety is our priority. If weather conditions are unsafe, we will reschedule your booking or offer a full refund. We monitor forecasts closely before every departure.
